title: The Hidden Cost of a Big Heart:  Understanding Emotional Burnout
description: In the emotionally demanding world we live in today, being extremely empathetic is viewed  as a positive attribute. People take great pride in being the one person everybody counts on: the listener, the supporter, the “strong one.” However, one does not consider the emotional toll of being available for everybody.
